info.title: KloudFox Controller API
info.description: KloudFox Controller API for monitoring, incident management, maintenance scheduling, status pages, and user management.

post.description: Takes a set of user credentials and returns an access and refresh JSON web token pair.
Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web token.
Authenticate with email and password to receive JWT tokens.
